learned_patterns.pattern: MU beat streak is 8 consecutive quarters with accelerating magnitude. A MU EPS beat reliably lifts the entire semiconductor cohort next session.
Do not chase AH semiconductor gap-ups. Wait 5–10 min post-open for volatility to settle. Set limit orders 2–3% below the opening print for large gap-ups (>2%).
Fractional share positions cannot use any conditional sell order. Both stop_market and limit sells are rejected by the API. Only market sells work.
Leveraged ETFs (AMDL, NVDL, SOXL) are incompatible with CLU's thesis-hold approach. Require a documented private-market vector thesis for every entry.
GFD (Good For Day) is the only valid time-in-force for fractional dollar-amount orders. GTC is rejected by the Robinhood API for fractional entries.

earnings.impact: CONFIRMED — 8th consecutive beat. Entire semiconductor PV cohort reinforced.
